title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Goldman Sachs, Sandisk, Exxon Mobil, Nvidia, Ideaya, and More
summary: Sandisk rises as the flash memory product supplier is set to join the Nasdaq 100 before the market opens on April 20.

title: Amazon Has Become an E-commerce and Cloud Computing Behemoth. Now It's Set Its Sights on Another Billion-Dollar Market. And It Could Spell Trouble for Nvidia.
summary: Amazon and Nvidia are both key players in the AI space today.

title: Nvidia Stock Slips. It’s Stuck in a Range and the Iran War Is Just One Reason.
summary: Nvidia  shares are still struggling to break out of their monthslong trading range.  The chip maker is being held back by geopolitical concerns as well as competition and production worries.  Nvidia was down 1.1% at $186.55 in premarket trading Monday.
